title: Cognizant (CTSH) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?

title: Cognizant and Gilead Extend Partnership with Five-Year Service Agreement Estimated at $800 Million
text: Cognizant will manage Gilead's global IT infrastructure while leading digital transformation initiatives designed to enhance overall client experience and enable faster time to market for Gilead products. TEANECK, N.J.

title: Cognizant: A Managed Services Provider With Positive Net Income Growth And Cash Flow
text: Cognizant gets a buy rating today. Positives: YoY net income growth, strong liquidity & capital, 5-year dividend growth, undervalued vs its sector average. Headwinds: Current share price appears overbought, trending above its 200-day average.

title: Cognizant Schedules Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: TEANECK, N.J. , July 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH), a leading provider of information technology, consulting, and business process services, will announce results for the second quarter of 2023 on Wednesday, August 2, 2023, after market close.
